videos.headline: Georgia Tech storms field and hands No. 4 its Miami first loss of season
videos.description: Georgia Tech upsets No. 4 Miami for the second year in a row with a 28-23 win vs. the Hurricanes.

videos.description: Jamal Haynes scores a 16-yard touchdown to put Georgia Tech up early 7-0 vs. No. 4 Miami.
